name: 4th Lord Mahadasha/Antardasha — Property Purchase Gate
description: The major or sub-period of the 4th house lord opens the primary window for property purchase, house acquisition, and land transactions.

source_text.quote: In the Dasa of the 4th lord, the native acquires conveyances, lands, houses and enjoys domestic happiness.

all_of: The Mahadasha or Antardasha of the 4th Lord is active

interpretation.meaning: The 4th house lord's period activates the house of property, home, land, and immovable assets. Its Dasha/Bhukti creates the primary window for property acquisition.

metadata.notes: Primary property timing rule. The 4th house is THE house of immovable assets in Jyotish.

name: Moon-Moon Dasha — Home & Land Comfort Period
description: Moon Mahadasha with Moon Antardasha activates strong desire and opportunity for home acquisition and residential comfort.

source_text.quote: In Moon's Dasa, the native obtains a house, ornaments, cattle, lands and enjoys comforts at home.

interpretation.meaning: Moon-Moon double period intensifies the desire for home, comfort, and residential security. This is a powerful window for purchasing a personal residence.

metadata.notes: Moon is karaka of home and emotional security. Double Moon period creates strong pull toward residential property.

name: Sun-Mars Dasha — House Through Authority & Land
description: Sun Mahadasha with Mars Antardasha combines authority (Sun) with land ownership (Mars/Bhumi Karaka), creating opportunities for house purchase through government or paternal connections.

source_text.quote: In the sub-period of Mars in Sun's major period, the native gains lands, houses and property through royal favour or father.

interpretation.meaning: Sun (authority/father) combined with Mars (Bhumi Karaka/land) creates house acquisition through authoritative channels — government allotment, father's gift, or official property transfer.

metadata.notes: Sun-Mars combo particularly strong for government housing, plot allotments, and paternal property transfers.

name: Mars-Jupiter Dasha — Land Acquisition & Expansion
description: Mars Mahadasha with Jupiter Antardasha combines Bhumi Karaka (Mars/land) with expansion (Jupiter), creating powerful land acquisition and big property purchase window.

source_text.quote: In the Antardasha of Jupiter in Mars Dasa, there will be acquisition of lands, houses, cattle and grains. The native enjoys all comforts.

interpretation.meaning: Mars (Bhumi Karaka/land ruler) combined with Jupiter (expansion/wealth/dharma) is one of the strongest property acquisition combinations. Indicates large-scale land purchase or premium house acquisition.

metadata.notes: Mars-Jupiter is classically the strongest property acquisition dasha. Mars = land, Jupiter = expansion and wealth.

name: Mars-Venus Dasha — Villages & Luxury Property
description: Mars Mahadasha with Venus Antardasha combines land (Mars) with luxury and comfort (Venus), creating opportunities for village land, farmhouses, and luxury residential property.

source_text.quote: In Venus Antardasha during Mars Dasa, the native acquires villages, gardens, ornaments and enjoys conjugal happiness in new home.

interpretation.meaning: Mars (land/property) combined with Venus (luxury/comfort/beauty) creates opportunities for purchasing luxury homes, farmhouses, village property, and aesthetically pleasing real estate.

metadata.notes: Classical reference to 'villages' (grama) — in modern context translates to suburban plots, farmhouses, and luxury residential developments.

name: Saturn-Mars Dasha — Construction & Structure Building
description: Saturn Mahadasha with Mars Antardasha combines structures (Saturn) with land/action (Mars), creating powerful construction timing — building a house, renovation, or structural property investment.

source_text.quote: In the sub-period of Mars in Saturn's Dasa, the native constructs houses, acquires landed property, and engages in building activities.

interpretation.meaning: Saturn (structures/permanence/old buildings) combined with Mars (land/action/construction) is the primary construction combination. Indicates building a house, major renovation, or structural property development.

metadata.notes: Saturn-Mars is the classic construction combination. Saturn = cement/stone/structure, Mars = action/land/bricks.

name: Moon-Venus Dasha — Agricultural & Comfort Property
description: Moon Mahadasha with Venus Antardasha combines home/comfort (Moon) with luxury/beauty (Venus), creating opportunities for agricultural land purchase and comfort-focused residential property.

source_text.quote: In Venus Antardasha during Moon Dasa, the native acquires agricultural lands, beautiful residences, and enjoys domestic prosperity.

interpretation.meaning: Moon (home/comfort/water/agriculture) combined with Venus (beauty/luxury/fertility) creates opportunities for agricultural land, waterfront property, beautiful homes, and comfort-focused real estate.

metadata.notes: Moon-Venus is particularly strong for agricultural land, waterfront property, and homes with gardens/greenery.

name: Mercury-Moon Dasha — Construction Through Planning
description: Mercury Mahadasha with Moon Antardasha combines intellect/planning (Mercury) with home/comfort (Moon), creating opportunities for planned construction, architectural projects, and calculated property investment.

source_text.quote: In Moon's sub-period during Mercury's major period, the native constructs a house through intelligent planning and acquires comfortable dwelling.

interpretation.meaning: Mercury (intellect/planning/commerce) combined with Moon (home/comfort) creates opportunities for well-planned construction, calculated property investments, and architecturally designed homes.

metadata.notes: Mercury-Moon combines commercial intelligence with domestic desire. Good for planned/systematic property acquisition.

name: Moon-Jupiter Dasha — Property Expansion & Big Home
description: Moon Mahadasha with Jupiter Antardasha combines home desire (Moon) with expansion/wealth (Jupiter), creating opportunities for buying a bigger home, property expansion, or wealth-backed real estate.

source_text.quote: In Jupiter's sub-period during Moon's Dasa, the native acquires houses, lands of great value, and expands domestic prosperity greatly.

interpretation.meaning: Moon (home/comfort) combined with Jupiter (expansion/wealth/dharma) creates powerful property expansion energy — buying a bigger home, upgrading residence, or acquiring valuable real estate.

metadata.notes: Moon-Jupiter is one of the best combinations for property expansion. Jupiter blesses and expands whatever Moon desires.

name: Jupiter-Saturn Dasha — Large Lands & Institutional Property
description: Jupiter Mahadasha with Saturn Antardasha combines wealth/expansion (Jupiter) with structures/permanence (Saturn), creating opportunities for large land holdings, institutional property, and long-term real estate investment.

source_text.quote: In Saturn's sub-period during Jupiter's Dasa, the native acquires large tracts of land, permanent structures, and property that endures for generations.

interpretation.meaning: Jupiter (expansion/wealth) combined with Saturn (permanence/structures/old) creates opportunities for large-scale land acquisition, institutional buildings, and generational real estate that appreciates over time.

metadata.notes: Jupiter-Saturn combines wealth expansion with permanence. Creates long-term real estate investments that appreciate over decades.
